topStories.description: Air strikes have damaged at least four oil facilities since US-Israeli attacks on Iran began last month.

topStories.title: Iran fires back at Trump over threats to new Supreme Leader: ‘Be careful not to be eliminated’
topStories.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

dailyNews.title: White House denies US Navy escorted oil tanker through Strait of Hormuz, contradicting Energy Secy Chris Wright's claim
dailyNews.description: Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi accused US officials of spreading misinformation in order to influence markets.

dailyNews.title: White House clarifies Trump’s Tomahawk missile comments on Iran school strike, says President has ‘right to share views’
dailyNews.description: The missile strike o girls' school in Iran has intensified scrutiny on US actions in the conflict and remains a contentious issue, with investigations ongoing.

dailyNews.title: We destroyed 10 mine-laying boats, says Trump as US strikes Iranian vessels near Hormuz
dailyNews.description: We destroyed  minelaying boats says Trump as US strikes Iranian vessels near Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Short-term measure, won't benefit Russia: White House on oil waiver for India
dailyNews.description: Shortterm measure wont benefit Russia White House on oil waiver for India

dailyNews.title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia seeks diplomatic and economic gains from Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Putin pits himself as a potential mediator but that's not an easy sell, writes the BBC's Russia editor.

dailyNews.title: D.K. Shivakumar hosts dinner to mark six years as Karnataka Congress chief
dailyNews.description: Congratulating Shivakumar on completing six years at the helm of KPCC, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said his deputy’s sagacity, ideological commitment and hard work is a model for young leaders

dailyNews.title: West Asia conflict: Jaishankar holds ‘detailed’ conversation with Iranian counterpart Araghchi
dailyNews.description: It was the third time that Mr. Jaishankar spoke to Mr. Araghchi since the U.S. and Israel launched the joint military strikes on Iran

dailyNews.title: 'Good actors': White House on ‘allowing’ India to resume Russian oil purchase
dailyNews.description: She added that the US approved this decision as this Russian oil coming to India was “already at sea”.

dailyNews.title: Erika Kirk replaces late husband Charlie Kirk on US Air Force Academy advisory board after Trump appointment
dailyNews.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

dailyNews.title: UK sends warship HMS Dragon to Eastern Mediterranean after Cyprus drone attack
dailyNews.description: Britain has deployed the Royal Navy destroyer HMS Dragon to the eastern Mediterranean more than a week after a drone struck its RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus, an attack linked to escalating tensions following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Air strikes cause black rain and 'unprecedented' pollution in Tehran, scientists say
dailyNews.description: Air strikes have damaged at least four oil facilities since US-Israeli attacks on Iran began last month.

dailyNews.title: Iran fires back at Trump over threats to new Supreme Leader: ‘Be careful not to be eliminated’
dailyNews.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran war: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warns Tuesday will be ‘most intense day of strikes’
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday would be the most intense day yet of US strikes inside Iran as the conflict entered its 11th day. Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

dailyNews.title: From remote work to fuel rationing: How Asian countries are managing energy shortages amid US-Israel-Iran war
dailyNews.description: Asian nations such as Pakistan, Thailand and Vietnam are implementing measures to address economic instability caused by energy supply disruptions amid the Middle East conflict. This includes spending cuts, encouraging remote work and energy conservation efforts.

dailyNews.title: Poll shows majority of Americans oppose attack on Iran, 77% fear terror attack on US soil in retaliation
dailyNews.description: A majority of American voters do not support sending ground troops into Iran, but they also do not expect the conflict to end quickly. While most do not support US attack on Iran, many fear a terror attack on US soil in retaliation

dailyNews.title: ‘Muslims don’t belong in American society’: Republican Rep. Ogles pushes ban on immigration from Muslim-majority nations
dailyNews.description: Ogles announced plans to introduce legislation that would halt immigration from several countries with predominantly Muslim populations.

dailyNews.title: Gunshots reported outside US consulate in Toronto, Canada; police probing incident
dailyNews.description: Police in Canada are investigating after gunshots were reported at the US consulate in Toronto, though no injuries were reported. The incident comes days after a suspected improvised explosive device damaged the US embassy entrance in Oslo, Norway, where police are still searching for the suspect.

dailyNews.title: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
dailyNews.description: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tell the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.

dailyNews.title: US strike on key Iran oil hub would fit Trump's 'energy dominance doctrine,' expert says
dailyNews.description: Reports indicate President Donald Trump's administration is considering a direct attack on Iran's Kharg Island, which handles 90% of Iranian oil exports near the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Dem witness accuses Trump of ‘population purge,’ Kennedy fires back: ‘You trigger my gag reflex’
dailyNews.description: A Democrat-called witness at a Senate hearing drew a draw-dropping response from Sen. John Kennedy, R-La., after accusing the Trump administration of attempting a "population purge."

dailyNews.title: Ukrainian Paralympian Maksym Murashkovskyi wins silver medal after training with ChatGPT for 6 months
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian Paralympic biathlete Maksym Murashkovskyi said he trained with ChatGPT for six months before winning a silver medal at the 2026 Milan Cortina Paralympic Games.

dailyNews.title: Candace Cameron Bure accidentally found herself at a 'dark and demonic' underground 'S&M sex' party
dailyNews.description: Candace Cameron Bure reveals she accidentally attended a shocking Hollywood party that turned "dark and demonic," forcing her to make a quick exit.

dailyNews.title: Far-left lawmaker endorses candidate who boasted about voting with Republicans 80% of time
dailyNews.description: Rep. Pramila Jayapal endorsed Raj Goyle for New York comptroller, calling him a 'lifelong progressive' despite his own past descriptions of overlap with Republicans in Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Former Ravens tight end Hayden Hurst, 32, announces retirement after seven NFL seasons
dailyNews.description: Former Ravens tight end Hayden Hurst retired from the NFL on Monday after a unique journey from MLB draft pick to seven-year football career spanning five teams.

dailyNews.description: Over 100,000 federal workers go without pay as Trump urges Congress to fund DHS and pass the SAVE America Act, which would require proof of citizenship to vote.

dailyNews.title: Whoopi Goldberg claims Trump's actions in Iran are meant to distract from Nancy Guthrie case
dailyNews.description: Whoopi Goldberg suggested President Donald Trump's Iran actions were meant to distract from the Nancy Guthrie case during a discussion on "The View" Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: Judge Is Skeptical of Penn’s Argument Against Trump Demand for List of Jews
dailyNews.description: A federal judge appeared receptive to the Trump administration’s demands for information about the University of Pennsylvania’s Jewish faculty and staff as the government pursues an antisemitism investigation.

dailyNews.title: White House aware of Gulf countries' fears about interceptor shortage, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Gulf states have said they're running dangerously low on missile interceptors and have asked the U.S. to expedite new supplies, CBS News previously reported.

dailyNews.title: Can the president bring down gas prices? 5 options available to Trump.
dailyNews.description: Gas prices in the U.S. have surged roughly 20% since the attack on Iran. Read on to see what measures the Trump administration could take to offer relief.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon says about 140 U.S. service members wounded since Iran war began
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: About 140 to 150 U.S. service members wounded in Iran war so far, White House indicates
dailyNews.description: Approximately 140 U.S. service members have been wounded in the first 10 days of the war with Iran, the Pentagon said Tuesday. When asked to confirm, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said the number was "within that ballpark." CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi reports.

dailyNews.title: Inside the Iran war on what Hegseth says will be most intense day of strikes
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday morning that, "Today will be, yet again, our most intense day of strikes inside Iran." CBS News' Charlie D'Agata reports on the situation in the Middle East, Retired U.S. Navy Vice Admiral Robert Murrett joins with analysis and CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has the latest from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Tillis maintains blockade on Fed pick Kevin Warsh over Powell probe
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis met with Federal Reserve chairman nominee Kevin Warsh, who President Donald Trump wants to replace Chair Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
dailyNews.description: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.

dailyNews.title: 'Forever war': Democrats rebut Trump's assertion that Iran war nearing end
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Monday suggested the war may be nearing an end, sending markets soaring and oil plummeting.

dailyNews.title: Google deepens Pentagon AI push after Anthropic sues Trump administration
dailyNews.description: Google is rolling out a feature that lets civilian and military personnel build custom AI agents for unclassified work on the Pentagon's enterprise AI portal.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: Israel's president Herzog calls 'cost' for business the price for Middle East peace
dailyNews.description: Israeli President Isaac Herzog said the war against Iran is enabling people there "to rise up" against its repressive ruling regime.
